description: Streamlit app for Azure cost and usage insights with multi-resource-group aggregation and SQLite cache-first reads.

features.name: Azure Authentication Status
features.description: Show auth status and guidance for Azure CLI local auth vs managed identity in cloud

features.name: Subscription Selector
features.description: Dropdown showing subscriptions the user can access

features.name: Resource Group Multi-Select
features.description: Select one or more resource groups within selected subscription

features.name: Cost Tab
features.description: Aggregated total spend for last 30 days with breakdown by service and resource type

features.name: Usage Tab
features.description: Aggregated resource counts by type for selected resource groups

features.name: SQLite Cache-First Reads
features.description: Load cached snapshots by default and refresh live data on explicit user request

nfr.security: DefaultAzureCredential only; no credentials in source code; no sensitive data in logs
nfr.performance: Cached reads under 2 seconds and subscription load under 3 seconds on typical developer machine
nfr.reliability: Graceful fallback to mock data when Azure calls fail or return no usable data
nfr.observability: Python logging for API calls, cache source, errors, and fallback reasons

assumptions: User has run az login and has Reader access to target subscriptions
Azure Cost Management API is enabled and may return delayed data
App can run locally or in Azure Container Apps with managed identity
Developers run tests locally without requiring live Azure access
limits: Cost data shows last 30 days only in v1

folder_map.app/services: Business logic and local cache repository
folder_map.app/azure_api: Azure SDK wrappers for cost/resource/subscription/auth and mock fallback
folder_map.context: Machine-readable structured context and local cache DB
folder_map..github/workflows: CI/CD pipelines and context guard checks
